description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
New

Customize the message composer’s quick actions under Settings > Appearance > Composer

Added hover cards when you mouse over a user mention in a message

New one-time prompt to connect more accounts if you log in with 1 or fewer connected accounts

Added a warning when you attach media that the chat doesn’t support

Fixed & Improved

Drafted text will save and re-appear after editing another message

Fixed styling of the message composer on popout windows

When a message is selected, pressing ↑ will navigate to the previous message instead of editing the latest message

Fixed Alt+Enter / Option+Enter default shortcut to add a new line when writing a message

Telegram: Fixed 2FA when logging in

Lots of small visual fixes
